parameters.content:
## Sales Call Objection Extractor to Airtable Tracker — WayinVideo Find Moments + GPT-4o-mini + Airtable

For sales managers and revenue teams who want to automatically track objection patterns across their team's sales calls without manually reviewing every recording. This workflow uses the WayinVideo Find Moments API — not transcription — to scan the recording and find exact moments matching your search query, returning timestamps, descriptions, and relevance scores for each match. Submit a call recording URL and your objection search query via the form. WayinVideo finds up to 5 matching moments. GPT-4o-mini analyzes each moment and generates a structured coaching note — objection category, what happened, rep response assessment, coaching advice, and a suggested reframe in first person ready to use. Each moment is saved as a separate Airtable record with Status set to Needs Review.

## How it works
- **1. Form — Call Recording + Details** collects the recording URL, rep name, contact name, company, call purpose, date, and the objection search query
- **2. WayinVideo — Submit Find Moments** submits the URL and query to the Find Moments API — up to 5 matching moments returned
- **3. Wait — 90 Seconds** gives the API initial processing time
- **4. WayinVideo — Get Moments Results** polls the find-moments results endpoint
- **5. IF — Find Moments Complete?** checks for SUCCEEDED — if not, retries via 30-second wait
- **7. Code — Extract Objection Clips** reads the clips array, converts millisecond timestamps to MM:SS, and returns one item per clip
- **8. AI Agent — Generate Coaching Note** uses GPT-4o-mini to analyze each clip's metadata and write a 5-section coaching analysis
- **10. Code — Parse Coaching Output** extracts all 5 coaching sections via regex and assembles the Airtable record
- **11. HTTP — Save to Airtable** creates one record per objection moment with all 16 fields and Status set to Needs Review

## Set up steps
1. In **2. WayinVideo — Submit Find Moments** and **4. WayinVideo — Get Moments Results** — replace YOUR_WAYINVIDEO_API_KEY
2. In **9. OpenAI — GPT-4o-mini Model** — connect your OpenAI credential
3. In **11. HTTP — Save to Airtable** — replace YOUR_AIRTABLE_API_KEY (Personal Access Token from airtable.com/create/tokens with data.records:write scope), YOUR_AIRTABLE_BASE_ID, and YOUR_AIRTABLE_TABLE_NAME
4. Create an Airtable table named Sales Objections with fields: Call Date, Rep Name, Contact Name, Company, Call Purpose, Objection Type, Objection Category, Moment Title, Objection Description, Timestamp in Recording, Relevance Score, Rep Response Assessment, Coaching Note, Suggested Reframe, Recording URL, Status

## Form Input
Sales rep or manager submits recording URL, rep name, contact name, company, call purpose, call date, and the objection search query. The query directly drives which moments WayinVideo finds — be specific for better results.

nodes.name: Section — Find Moments Submit and Poll

parameters.content:
## WayinVideo Find Moments Submit and Poll
Submits the recording URL and search query to the Find Moments API — returning up to 5 matching moments with titles, descriptions, timestamps, and relevance scores. Waits 90 seconds then polls until SUCCEEDED.

nodes.name: Section — Status Check and Retry Loop

parameters.content:
## Find Moments Status Check and Retry Loop
IF checks for SUCCEEDED status. TRUE proceeds to clip extraction. FALSE waits 30 seconds and polls again. Loop continues until results are ready.

nodes.name: Section — Clip Extraction and AI Coaching Analysis

parameters.content:
## Clip Extraction and AI Coaching Analysis
Splits the clips array into one item per moment. GPT-4o-mini analyzes each clip using its title, description, and relevance score — generating objection category, what happened, rep response assessment, coaching note, and a first-person suggested reframe.

nodes.name: Section — Coaching Parse and Airtable Save

parameters.content:
## Coaching Parse and Airtable Save
Regex extracts all 5 coaching sections and assembles the full Airtable record. One record created per objection moment with Status set to Needs Review for manager review.

values.placeholder: e.g. Discovery Call, Demo, Pricing Call, Follow-up
e.g. pricing too expensive / competitor comparison / missing feature / timing not right

parameters.formDescription: Paste your sales call recording URL. AI will find every objection moment, analyze how it was handled, and log a coaching note to Airtable.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "video_url": "{{ $json['Call Recording URL'] }}",
  "query": "{{ $json['Objection Type to Search'] }}",
  "project_name": "Objection — {{ $json['Contact Name'] }} | {{ $json['Company Name'] }}",
  "limit": 5,
  "enable_export": false,
  "target_lang": "en"
}

parameters.text:
=You are an expert sales coach analyzing a specific objection moment from a sales call recording.

A video AI tool has already identified and extracted this exact moment from the recording. Your job is to analyze it and provide structured coaching for the sales manager.

---

## CALL CONTEXT
- Sales Rep: {{ $json.repName }}
- Contact: {{ $json.contactName }} at {{ $json.companyName }}
- Call Type: {{ $json.callPurpose }}
- Call Date: {{ $json.callDate }}
- Objection Search Query Used: {{ $json.objectionType }}

## MOMENT FOUND BY WAYINVIDEO
- Moment Title: {{ $json.clipTitle }}
- Description: {{ $json.clipDescription }}
- Timestamp in Recording: {{ $json.timestampStart }} — {{ $json.timestampEnd }}
- Relevance Score: {{ $json.clipScore }}/100
- Tags: {{ $json.clipTags }}

---

## YOUR TASK
Based on the moment description and context above, provide a structured coaching analysis.

## RULES
1. Base your analysis ONLY on the moment description provided — do not invent details
2. Be specific and actionable — not generic sales advice
3. Suggested reframe must be a specific alternative response the rep could use next time
4. Keep each section concise — 2-3 sentences maximum

---

## OUTPUT FORMAT
Return your response in this exact structure:

OBJECTION_CATEGORY:
[Choose one: Pricing / Competitor / Timing / Feature Gap / Trust / Authority / Need / Other]

WHAT_HAPPENED:
[1-2 sentences describing the objection based on the moment description]

REP_RESPONSE_ASSESSMENT:
[1-2 sentences assessing how the rep likely handled it based on context — or 'Unable to assess — review recording at timestamp']

COACHING_NOTE:
[2-3 sentences of specific coaching advice for the sales manager to share with the rep]

SUGGESTED_REFRAME:
[Write the exact alternative response the rep could say next time this objection comes up — in first person, ready to use]

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "fields": {
    "Call Date": "{{ $json.callDate }}",
    "Rep Name": "{{ $json.repName }}",
    "Contact Name": "{{ $json.contactName }}",
    "Company": "{{ $json.companyName }}",
    "Call Purpose": "{{ $json.callPurpose }}",
    "Objection Type": "{{ $json.objectionType }}",
    "Objection Category": "{{ $json.objectionCategory }}",
    "Moment Title": "{{ $json.momentTitle }}",
    "Objection Description": "{{ $json.objectionDescription }}",
    "Timestamp in Recording": "{{ $json.timestamp }}",
    "Relevance Score": {{ $json.relevanceScore }},
    "Rep Response Assessment": "{{ $json.repResponseAssessment }}",
    "Coaching Note": "{{ $json.coachingNote }}",
    "Suggested Reframe": "{{ $json.suggestedReframe }}",
    "Recording URL": "{{ $json.recordingUrl }}",
    "Status": "Needs Review"
  }
}
